# polyX(x,y):

- 2.892057951543222e-38 * x^10 * y^1
+ 2.488301836229024e-38 * x^9 * y^2
+ 1.466588147529095e-38 * x^8 * y^3
+ 1.180595696112028e-37 * x^7 * y^4

+ 8.009396571814555e-38 * x^5 * y^6

+ 2.0779071101587e-37 * x^1 * y^10
+ 1.158140331986445e-36 * y^11
+ 6.65034960504288e-35 * x^10
- 5.66067472914225e-35 * x^9 * y^1
+ 6.150937360887453e-35 * x^8 * y^2
+ 3.466540124959812e-35 * x^7 * y^3

+ 6.520736306128871e-34 * x^4 * y^6

+ 9.830759127020346e-35 * x^2 * y^8

+ 7.52603229337309e-34 * y^10
+ 5.383210682969779e-31 * x^9

# polyY(x,y):
